'''鈭歜-ch-d''' ('''kabachad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycologize|mycologize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ch-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycologize|mycologize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-ch-d
|-
! Lemma
| kabachad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibachad|thibachad]] || [[word:jibachad|jibachad]] || [[word:shibachad|shibachad]] || [[word:kibachad|kibachad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubachad|thuthubachad]] || [[word:jujubachad|jujubachad]] || [[word:shushubachad|shushubachad]] || [[word:kukubachad|kukubachad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubachad|thubachad]] || [[word:jubachad|jubachad]] || [[word:shubachad|shubachad]] || [[word:kubachad|kubachad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubachad|thubachad]] || [[word:jubachad|jubachad]] || [[word:shubachad|shubachad]] || [[word:kubachad|kubachad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebachad|thebachad]] || [[word:jebachad|jebachad]] || [[word:shebachad|shebachad]] || [[word:kebachad|kebachad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobachad|thothobachad]] || [[word:jojobachad|jojobachad]] || [[word:shoshobachad|shoshobachad]] || [[word:kokobachad|kokobachad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobachad|thobachad]] || [[word:jobachad|jobachad]] || [[word:shobachad|shobachad]] || [[word:kobachad|kobachad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobachad|thobachad]] || [[word:jobachad|jobachad]] || [[word:shobachad|shobachad]] || [[word:kobachad|kobachad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]] || [[word:bachad|bachad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bachad|th忙bachad]] || [[word:j忙bachad|j忙bachad]] || [[word:sh忙bachad|sh忙bachad]] || [[word:k忙bachad|k忙bachad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabachad|thathabachad]] || [[word:jajabachad|jajabachad]] || [[word:shashabachad|shashabachad]] || [[word:kakabachad|kakabachad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabachad|thabachad]] || [[word:jabachad|jabachad]] || [[word:shabachad|shabachad]] || [[word:kabachad|kabachad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabachad|thabachad]] || [[word:jabachad|jabachad]] || [[word:shabachad|shabachad]] || [[word:kabachad|kabachad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabachad|shabachad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabachad|goshabachad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabachad|gokishabachad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabachadn眉|shabachadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabachadnkn眉|goshabachadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabachadn眉|gokishabachadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabachadsh毛|shabachadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabachadnksh毛|goshabachadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabachadsh毛|gokishabachadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabachadro|shabachadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabachadnkro|goshabachadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabachadro|gokishabachadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabachadmu|shabachadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabachadnkmu|goshabachadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabachadmu|gokishabachadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabachadsher|shabachadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabachadnksher|goshabachadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabachadsher|gokishabachadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabachadng|shabachadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabachadnkng|goshabachadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabachadng|gokishabachadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabachadya|shabachadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabachadnkya|goshabachadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabachadya|gokishabachadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabachadyam|shabachadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabachadnkyam|goshabachadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabachadyam|gokishabachadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabachadn眉sh毛|shabachadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabachadnkn眉sh毛|goshabachadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabachadn眉sh毛|gokishabachadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabachadn眉ro|shabachadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabachadnkn眉ro|goshabachadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabachadn眉ro|gokishabachadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabachadn眉mu|shabachadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabachadnkn眉mu|goshabachadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabachadn眉mu|gokishabachadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabachadsh毛n眉|shabachadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabachadnksh毛n眉|goshabachadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabachadsh毛n眉|gokishabachadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabachadsh毛ro|shabachadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabachadnksh毛ro|goshabachadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabachadsh毛ro|gokishabachadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabachadsh毛mu|shabachadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabachadnksh毛mu|goshabachadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabachadsh毛mu|gokishabachadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabachadron眉|shabachadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabachadnkron眉|goshabachadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabachadron眉|gokishabachadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabachadrosh毛|shabachadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabachadnkrosh毛|goshabachadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabachadrosh毛|gokishabachadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabachadromu|shabachadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabachadnkromu|goshabachadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabachadromu|gokishabachadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabachadmun眉|shabachadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabachadnkmun眉|goshabachadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabachadmun眉|gokishabachadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabachadmush毛|shabachadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabachadnkmush毛|goshabachadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabachadmush毛|gokishabachadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabachadmuro|shabachadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabachadnkmuro|goshabachadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabachadmuro|gokishabachadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
